case_title: DONNY LAU VS. BIG FAT, INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION DBA BIG FAT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, DONNY AS TO DEFENDANT BIG FAT, INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION DBA BIG FAT PROMOTIONS JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAU, DONNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIG FAT, INC., A NEW YORK CORPORATION DBA BIG FAT PROMOTIONS $5,699.28 PRINCIPAL, $12.27 INTEREST, $120.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,831.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
